deploy.startCommand: echo '[dbg] v7 diagnostics' && node -e "console.log('[dbg] node prints OK:', process.version)" && echo '[dbg] dist listing:' && ls dist && echo '[dbg] boot-marker count in dist/main.js:' && grep -c 'boot' dist/main.js; echo '[dbg] grep exit above; launching app' && node dist/main.js
